components.rationale: Current benchmark directly exercises the fallback-first authoritative simulation loop.
Current benchmark and Gate D acceptance cover cadence, freshness, packet, and action-application behavior.
Adapter-facing execution exists only as an early gym rollout path and is not yet the primary benchmark boundary.
The integrated harness and report regeneration now exist, but remain an early first slice rather than the final long-lifecycle system.
A learned or richer baseline RL agent is not yet part of the authoritative benchmark path.
